:::{#thm-d_odds_d_beta}
#### Gradient of odds w.r.t. coefficients

::: notes
To derive $\derivf{\odds}{\vb}$,
we can apply the [vector chain rule](math-prereqs.qmd#thm-chain-vec) again
along with @lem-deriv-invodds and @lem-d_logodds-d_vb:
:::

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\vb}
&= \red{\derivf{\eta}{\vb}} \teal{\derivf{\odds}{\logodds}}
&& \text{(vector chain rule, through } \logodds = \eta \text{)}
\\
&= \red{\vx} \teal{\derivf{\odds}{\logodds}}
&& \text{(gradient of log-odds w.r.t. coefficients: } \derivf{\eta}{\vb} = \vx \text{)}
\\
&= \red{\vx} \teal{\odds}
&& \text{(derivative of odds w.r.t. log-odds: } \derivf{\odds}{\logodds} = \odds \text{)}
\ea
$$

:::

:::{#cor-d_odds_d_beta}

#### Gradient of odds w.r.t. coefficients in terms of probability

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\vb}
&= \red{\vx} \teal{\odds}
&& \text{(gradient of odds w.r.t. coefficients)}
\\
&= \red{\vx} \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}
&& \text{(odds in terms of probability: } \odds = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi} \text{)}
\ea
$$

:::
